results.title: Celtic plan for the future as EIGHT academy players sign professional contracts
results.description: Celtic have confirmed that a group of academy prospects have signed their first professional contracts with the club.

results.title: Planning to Watch the FIFA World Cup Final? Airtel Plan May Already Have You Covered

results.title: PlayStation Plus Premium July 2026 Game Revealed Early
results.description: In case you missed it, Sony has already confirmed a PS Plus Premium game for July 2026 for the PS5 and PS4. Included in June’s PlayStation State of Play was the announcement that PS2 action adventure game Psi-Ops: The Mindgate Conspiracy will join the classics lineup this month. When will the PS Plus July 2026 game Psi-Ops: [...] The post PlayStation Plus Premium July 2026 Game Revealed Early appeared first on PlayStation LifeStyle .

results.title: Sources: United in advanced talks for Tielemans
results.description: Manchester United are in advanced talks to sign Youri Tielemans from Aston Villa, sources have told ESPN.
